feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issues enabling integration suite capabilities
entry.content: I found several issues trying to enable integratiion suite capabilities in trial tenant, and cannot found logs to address/help in solution. Do you have some ideas?

entry.title: Data Center Availability (Provider) of SAP Integration Suite Basic Edition
entry.content:
Hi all,

i'm just wondering, if SAP Integation Suite Basic Edition is really just only available via Provider "Alibaba" and Region "China".  SAP Discovery Center shows me only those region & provider available by now.

entry.title: Unable to view Discover Type Systems/ MIG/ MAG Integration Advisor in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi All , 

I am unable to view  Discover Type Systems/ MIG/ MAG in Integration Advisor, but i can see Managing Trading Partner, Manage APIs. We tried with Manage Capabilities but still same issue. Can some let me know the exact role or procedure to view the Discover Type Systems/ MIG/ MAG Integration Advisor in Integration Suite . 

Regards , 

 

Giridhar

entry.title: Size Limit For Exchange Property in Content Modifier in SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am curious about if there's any size limit for Exchange Property in Content Modifier in SAP CPI?

To be specific, to loop-getting data, I use Looping Process Call to get payload, and create a property (by using content modifier) in order to temporarily store and append data being fetched. The configuration of the property is as follow.

Action: Create

Name: StorePayload

Source Type: Expression

Source Value: ${property.StorePayload}${in.body}

 

I wonder how much data can I temporarily store in this property. (50MB? 100MB?)

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to retrieve an attached PDF file that is encoded in Base64 from a mime multipart format email
entry.content:
How to retrieve an attached PDF file that is encoded in Base64 from a mime multipart format email

Please share any ideas you may have.

I'm considering implementing this in Groovy

Environment is Integration Suite CloudIntegraion IntegrationFlow

Cloud Integration SAP Integration Suite @sap

entry.title: create and update value mapping table based on incoming payload
entry.content:
hello Dear Collogues,

i need to update value mapping dynamically or runtime based on payload.

for example

<contacts>

<name>ram</name>
<email>ram@gmail.com</email>
<depratment>IT</depratment>
<address>abc india </address>
</contacts>

our VM looks like

sourceAgency1 Identi1 targetAgency2 Idernr2


key value
ram,ram@gmail.com,IT 123456(unique number generated)

so next time same key come its not inseted key value in VM table

please help me its very complex for us as i am new one to SAP CPI

entry.title: How to create build for Integration Suite Artifact with downloaded artifact zip
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking for a way to generate mtar for download artifact(in this case Integration Flow) zip using mbt build/assemble.

The idea is to use Accelerator Hub API(https://api.sap.com/api/IntegrationContent/path/get_IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts_Id___Id___Version___Version_____value ) to download integration artifact, generate mtar and upload the same to cTMS. 

I am able to successfully conduct this exercise with Integration Suite Package as package is exported with expected files(artifact content, contentmetdata.md, hash, resources.cnt), but this is not the case when we download individual artifacts.

Now I know that I can directly use "Transport" functionality in cTMS. But we wish to take the build through our CI/CD tool.

I have checked project piper documentation, but they also can only do the mtar for entire package.

Also, we do not wish to directly upload artifacts with accelerator hub API.

 

Any suggestion is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have around 50+ custom iflow interfaces in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration).

My functional team is asking to give KT on how and what all needs to be monitored on the Cloud Integration to ensure that interfaces are working fine and also check by themselves if some messages are processed successfully. Should we need to define custom headers so that they could search/filter themessages using custom header value in message monitoring. Could you please explain the below different error types in Cloud Integration monitoring?

 

 

They might ask each and everthing on monitoring and they are asking me to make presentation and show it to them.. can someone tell me if there are any such nice blogs regarding monitoring in Cloud Integration. I could make use that blog/article to explain them monitoring of messages..

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Integration between S/4Hana Public Cloud and non-SAP dashboard application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new to the Integration topic and I would like to get a possible solution to enable a third party dashboard application to access data from the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system.

I am aware that S/4HANA Cloud provides pre-delivered APIs which could be leveraged. Or custom CDS Views could be built from whitelisted CDS Views and exposed as OData service to be consumed. Is SAP CPI (Cloud Platform Integration) required for this?

entry.title: How to expose API documentation?
entry.content:
Hello there,

I'm new to Integration Suite and as a first task, I want to expose a common SAP API to a 3rd party product. For testing purposes, I started with BusinessPartner.

I can access and change an API documentation in API Designer, which is great. But how can I access the final documentation without accessing API Designer? I mean how can our partner access the API documentation.

api.sap.com is not valid for my scenario as I may change api by policies or even if I develop a custom one.

Is there some URL I can use to access the nicely formattet documentation? (the left part)

entry.title: Parallel multicast to broadcast messages to multiple systems
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have one interface in SAP PO which sends messages to eight partner systems at a time.

Currently if we migrate the interfaces to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration) , we have the idea to use parallel Multicast pallet option to broadcast the messages to multiple partner systems at a time. But, if we use multicast option then if due to some reason one of the partner system is down, technical connection issue to that partner system (authentication, Firewall issue etc.,).. then all the messages that are supposed to be processed for other partner systems also get stuck in Cloud Integration because of the issue due to one of the partner system. Could you please let us know what is the alternate option available instead of "Parallel Multicast" pallet option in Cloud Integration? Thank you!

Regards,

Ramu.

entry.title: General Splitter issue for a xml file with multiple transactions
entry.content: Have a CPI scenario where one xml file can have multiple record/transaction. I am then using General splitter and route each transaction to a receiver via SFTP. How do I handle a scenario where xml file has let's say 5 transactions and there is an error in the 3rd transaction. Iflow ends here, that means 2 records/transactions were successful via SFTP but iflow ends at 3rd transaction. Is there a way where iflow does not end at 3rd record and continues to process remaining records?

entry.title: Unable to Retrieve Organization Secret and User Secret from Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi all, in an attempt to integrate SAP Open Connectors to Datasphere I followed the following guide to set up BTP and establish an Open Connectors Instance:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/extend-sap-datasphere-with-sap-open-connectors/ba-p/13554164

however I require an Organizational Secret as well as a User Secret which are not visible.

I'm not sure if there are role collections but I've following the following for access troubleshooting:

https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/configuring-user-access
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/grant-users-access-to-open-connectors-capability-within-sap-integration/ba-p/13574483

I was the first Integration Suite Provisioner in this subaccount.

Any assistance would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: Message Mapping XML Upload Error
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created XSD structure in Message mapping and did the mapping of source and target system, now I am trying to upload a XML file to test in Simulation mode as shown below in the screenshot.

While doing the test I am getting below error: 

com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException: The prefix "ns11" for attribute "ns11:schemaLocation" associated with an element type "AgileData" is not bound.

XSD File Snippet: 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xs:schema xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://www.oracle.com/webfolder/technetwork/xml/plm/2016/09/">
<xsd:element name="AgileData">

XML File snippet that I am uploading: 
<AgileData xmlns="http://www.oracle.com/webfolder/technetwork/xml/plm/2016/09/" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.oracle.com/webfolder/technetwork/xml/plm/2016/09/ http://www.oracle.com/webfolder/technetwork/xml/plm/2016/09/aXML.xsd">

Message Mapping Screenshot: 

 

Simulation Screenshot: 

Error: 

Kindly guide me in getting rid of the error.

Thankyou 🙂

entry.title: Integration Suite – SF Principal Propagation: Error Retrieval of OAuthToken
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We want to try Principal Propagation to SuccessFactors in Integration Suites so we can perform SuccessFactors approval (SF API approveWfRequest and rejectWfRequest) from external system (mobile apps)—that needs to be executed using the actual approver’s user ID.

 

We have followed the steps to configured the Principal Propagation in this blog: Principal Propagation in SAP Integration Suite from external system to SuccessFactors, however we still got error :

ErrorCode :200 ErrorMessage :Retrieval of OAuthToken failed due to: Cannot determine user to propagate for OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion destination. Either provide user_token JWT token (https://docs.cloudfoundry.org/api/uaa/version/4.7.1/index.html#user-token-grant) when retrieving the destination or configure it with SystemUser..)

 

 

Following are our configurations in BTP, SF, and Integration Suites.

 

Role Collection in BTP with 2 users that have account in SF:

 

 

OAuth configuration in SF using Certificate downloaded from BTP Destination:

 

 

Security Material created in Integration Suites using Client Key from ZOAUTH_IS_2 API Key.

 

 

And lastly, this is our integration flow and how we call it using Postman (with user configured in role collection SF_Propagation):

 

 

 

 

 

 

Is there anything wrong with our configuration? Or there is missing configuration that we need to execute?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP CPI--> S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

I'm new to S4 HANA integrations. I want to upload exchange rate data from an API into a table in SAP S/4 HANA via SAP CPI. My question is how can we setup connectivity with S/4 HANA and post the data to that particular TCURR table. Also, which receiver adapter is best suited for this scenario. 

Kindly help with your inputs.

Thank you,

Sri

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite - Wrong exercise in the lesson.
entry.content:
On Developing with SAP Integration Suite/Using Mappings

The first exercise in the lesson is a previous exercise. I was able to see the right one before it was replaced by this, so I know that this isn't the correct one and I was so confused when I got back to continue this exercise.


I cant seem to find any flag or report button to inform anyone to fix this. I really want to continue this guide and I only have 3 days left on my trial.

entry.title: can i use number range for some set is the same number?
entry.content:
for example :

<ID1>123XYZ  

<internalID>1</InternalID>

</ID1>

<ID1>123XYZ  

<internalID>2</InternalID>

</ID1>

<ID2>1234XYZ  

<internalID>1</InternalID>

</ID2>

quiestion 1:

if ID1 = 123XYZ  for the ID1, internalID everytime it auto incement by one(number range).

if ID2= 1234xyz for the ID2, internalID  again number start from 1(number range) .

is it possible through number range please let us know?

question 2:

if for InternalID number range(start from 1) reached till last number(99999999999999) how we can change number different from 1 to 9(14 times) for internalID

is it possible through number range?

entry.title: How to control externally the iflow in integration suite?
entry.content:
How to control externally the iflow in integration suite? i.e. What is the substitute of external channel concept of SAP PO in SAP Integration Suite? 

We have current scenario in PO that we are externally controlling the channels from ABAP program. How we can achieve this in Integration Suite?

entry.title: I have disabled CSRF under https adapter still getting 403 forbidden error
